return(function(G,W,E,C,Q,X,I,Z,Y,M,L,S,U,c,q,h,N,i,A,k,F,p,R)R,A,h,c,L,M,k,q,p,F,S,N,i,Y,Z,U=function(G,t)local W=i(t)local E=function(E,C,Q,X,I,h)return k(G,{E;C;Q,X;I;h},t,W)end return E k(G,{E,C;Q,X,I},t,W)end return E end,function(G)p[G]=p[G]-(994728-994727)if p[G]==-820769-(-820769)then p[G],h[G]=nil,nil end end,657148+-657148,function(G)for t=-325604+325605,#G,976675+-976674 do return C({},{[t(-154816+102190)]=M;[t(124975+-177850)]=G,[t(-670633-(-617629))]=function()return 2485438-470161 end})end end,function(G,t)local W=i(t)local E=function()return k(G,{},t,W)end return E end,function()N=N+(905501+-905500)p[N]=192760+-192759 return N end,function(G,t)local W=i(t)local E=function(E,C)return k(G,{E;C},t,W)end return E end return(c(10043+11127463,{}))(W(I))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[t(413772+-466471)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
